description_long: This house is a large, multi-sectioned residential building with a predominantly rectangular footprint and a complex, stepped facade. The exterior is finished in light gray brickwork, with numerous symmetrically arranged windows on all visible sides, providing ample natural light. The structure features two main wings flanking a central section, each with its own set of stairs leading to the ground level, and a gated courtyard at the front. The roof is mostly flat, with some minor elevation changes and stair access points, and there are small green yard areas visible on one side. The main entryway is marked by a double gate and steps, with decorative fencing and lamp posts enhancing the entrance. Overall, the house exhibits a blend of traditional and modern elements, with a focus on symmetry and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A large, light gray brick house with symmetrical windows, flat roofs, and a gated courtyard entry. The structure features multiple wings, exterior stairs, and small yard areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with symmetrical windows, central entry, and both wings extending outward.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard area, green yard space, and rear stair access to the upper level.
description_view_2: Direct view of the gated courtyard, main entry steps, and prominent exterior stairs on both sides.
description_view_3: Side/rear view focusing on the green yard, side wing, and rear stairway, with less emphasis on the main entry.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double gate with steps, decorative fencing, and lamp posts; no porch or columns.
